name: Sell's Auto Center
notes: CMS: Lovable (lovable.app) — React SPA deployed on Lovable's hosting, canonical URL sellsauto.lovable.app. Feed discovery exhausted: no /wp-json/ (404), no /feed or /feed.xml, robots.txt Sitemap directive points to static-page sitemap with no inventory slugs (only /inventory top-level page, /finance, /service, /contact, and city landing pages). No embedded JSON-LD vehicle data in page HTML — only AutoDealer org schema without listing entries. No __NEXT_DATA__ or hydration globals. Lovable apps use Supabase as backend; Supabase project ID not exposed in page source. Inventory is loaded entirely client-side via Supabase JS SDK — inaccessible without browser JS execution or Supabase API key. No inventory data could be extracted. Coverage: summary-only.
